title: Discovery Catalog — metadata.yaml
description: Schema for the metadata.yaml file required in every agent folder.

name.description: Kebab-case unique identifier for this agent.

associated_tools.description: Relative paths (from repo root) to each tool sub-folder under this agent's tools/ directory.

associated_agents.description: Relative paths to agent folders in this repository that this agent depends on at runtime.

name.description: Display name of the publishing team or organisation.

contact.description: Primary contact email for this agent.

support_url.description: URL to the support page or issue tracker for this agent.

party.description: Optional. '1p' = Microsoft first-party authored; '3p' = ISV / external partner. Drives the 1p-contribution / 3p-contribution PR labels.

description.description: Plain-language description of what this agent or project does. Maximum 500 characters.

tags.description: One or more tags for discoverability in Discovery Studio.

path.description: Relative path from repo root to this folder (e.g. agents/my-agent). Auto-derived from folder structure if omitted.

supported_regions.description: Azure region ARM aliases where this agent is supported. If omitted, the agent is considered globally available.
